title: Is there a way to expand and collapse all Group Items across the entire Board in the Main Table?
excerpt: I have several different Boards that I use that have several Groups with several Items in each Group. In the Main Table view there does not seem to be a simple function to either expand or collapse all the Items in each …

posts.author: Hollywood_Jeff (Jeff Peri)
posts.cookedHtml: I have several different Boards that I use that have several Groups with several Items in each Group. In the Main Table view there does not seem to be a simple function to either expand or collapse all the Items in each Group across the entire Main Table view. There should be a function to expand and collapse all the Items under each Group across the entire board in the Main Table view. Is there a way to do add this capability?

posts.author: aluksik (Andy Luksik)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you mean the Ctrl + G hotkey? If not, can you reword your comment as I’m not sure what you are asking then.

posts.author: Hollywood_Jeff (Jeff Peri)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! I could not find that info anywhere. Thank you.

posts.author: kjur (Ken Jur)
posts.cookedHtml: do you have the hot key for a mac? to do the same thing?

posts.author: kjur (Ken Jur)
posts.cookedHtml: figured out, the desktop version wasn’t working properly, but i reinstalled and it started working. CMD + G on a mac does it! Thanks all.
